verses.text: Ṭā’ Sīn Mīm.
Those are the signs of the clear Book.

verses.quran_arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَٰخِعٌۭ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Perhaps you are going to destroy yourself because they do not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةًۭ فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
verses.text: If We (so) please, We shall send down on them a sign from the sky, and their necks will stay bowed before it.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ اَ۬يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمۡ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ اَ۬يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ  أَعۡنَٰقُهُمۡ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ اَ۟يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمُۥ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ اَ۟يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمُۥ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: But no new reminder comes to them from the Merciful without their turning away from it.

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: They have called (it) a lie, so the story of what they were mocking will come to them.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۢ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: Do they not look at the earth – how many (things) of every excellent kind We have caused to grow in it?

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them are not believers.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord called to Moses: ‘Go to a people who are evildoers,
the people of Pharaoh. Will they not guard (themselves)?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, surely I fear that they will call me a liar,

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَٰرُونَ
verses.text: and my heart will be distressed, and my tongue will not work. So send for Aaron.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌۭ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
verses.text: And they (also) have a crime against me, and I fear they will kill me.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘By no means! Go, both of you, with Our signs. Surely We shall be with you, hearing (everything).

verses.quran_arabic: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: So come, both of you, to Pharaoh, and say: “Surely we are the messenger of the Lord of the worlds.
Send forth the Sons of Israel with us.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًۭا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Did we not bring you up among us as a child, and did you not remain among us for some years of your life?

verses.quran_arabic: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Yet you did the deed you did, and were one of the ungrateful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًۭا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘I did it when I was one of those who had gone astray,

verses.quran_arabic: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًۭا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: and I fled from you when I became afraid of you. But my Lord granted me judgment, and made me one of the envoys.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌۭ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: And that is a blessing you bestow on me, that you have enslaved the Sons of Israel.’
Pharaoh said, ‘What is the Lord of the worlds?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, if you (would) be certain.’ He said to those who were around him,
‘Do you not hear?’
He said, ‘Your Lord and the Lord of your fathers of old.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely your messenger who has been sent to you is possessed indeed.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘The Lord of the East and the West, and whatever is between them, if you (would) understand.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘If indeed you take a god other than me, I shall indeed make you one of the imprisoned.’
He said, ‘Even if I brought you something clear?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Bring it, if you are one of the truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: So he cast (down) his staff, and suddenly it became a real snake,

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
verses.text: and he drew forth his hand, and suddenly it became white to the onlookers.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He said to the assembly around him, ‘Surely this is a skilled magician indeed.

verses.quran_arabic: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
verses.text: He wants to expel you from your land by his magic. So what do you command?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَٰشِرِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Put him and his brother off (for a while), and raise up searchers in the cities
to bring you every skilled magician.’
So the magicians were gathered together for the meeting on a day made known.
And it was said to the people, ‘Will you (too) gather together?’

verses.quran_arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: ‘Perhaps we will follow the magicians, if they are the victors.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: When the magicians came, they said to Pharaoh, ‘(Will there) surely (be) for us a reward indeed, if we are the victors?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًۭا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Yes, and surely then you will indeed be among the ones brought near.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
verses.text: Moses said to them, ‘Cast (down) what you are going to cast.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَٰلِبُونَ
verses.text: So they cast their ropes and their staffs, and said, ‘By the honor of Pharaoh! Surely we shall be the victors indeed.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
verses.text: And then Moses cast his staff, and suddenly it swallowed up what they were falsely contriving.
And the magicians were cast (down) in prostration.
They said, ‘We believe in the Lord of the worlds,
the Lord of Moses and Aaron.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَٰفٍۢ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘You have believed in him before I gave you permission. Surely he is indeed your master, the (very) one who taught you magic. But soon indeed you will know! I shall indeed cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I shall indeed crucify you – all (of you)!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘No harm! Surely we are going to return to our Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely we are eager that our Lord should forgive us our sins, because we are the first of the believers.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.text: And We inspired Moses: ‘Journey with My servants. Surely you will be followed.’
So Pharaoh sent searchers into the cities:
‘Surely these (people) are indeed a small band,
and surely they are indeed enraging us,
but surely we are indeed all vigilant.’

canonical_variants.english: But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
But indeed, we are constantly cautious.

verses.text: So We brought them forth from gardens and springs,
and treasures and an honorable place.
So (it was), and We caused the Sons of Israel to inherit them.
So they followed them at sunrise,

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
verses.text: and when the two forces saw each other, the companions of Moses said, ‘Surely we are indeed overtaken!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: He said, ‘By no means! Surely my Lord is with me. He will guide me.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍۢ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: And so We inspired Moses: ‘Strike the sea with your staff!’ And it parted, and each part was like a great mountain.
We brought the others near to that place,
and We rescued Moses and those who were with him – all (of them).
Then We drowned the others.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
Recite to them the story of Abraham:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: When he said to his father and his people, ‘What do you serve?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًۭا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَٰكِفِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘We serve idols, and continue (to be) devoted to them.’
He said, ‘Do they hear you when you call,
or do they benefit you or harm (you)?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘No! But we found our fathers doing so.’
He said, ‘Do you see what you have been serving,
you and your fathers who preceded (you)?

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Surely they are an enemy to me – except the Lord of the worlds,
who created me, and He guides me,
and who – He gives me food and gives me drink,
and when I am sick, He heals me.
He (it is) who causes me to die, (and) then gives me life,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and who – I am eager that He should forgive me my sin on the Day of Judgment.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًۭا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: My Lord, grant me judgment, and join me with the righteous,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍۢ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and assign to me a good reputation among later (generations).
Make me one of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: And forgive my father, (for) surely he is one of those who have gone astray.
Do not disgrace me on the Day when they are raised up,

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌۭ وَلَا بَنُونَ
verses.text: the Day when neither wealth nor children will benefit (them),

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍۢ سَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: except for the one who comes to God with a sound heart.
The Garden will be brought near for the ones who guard themselves,
and the Furnace will come forth for the ones who are in error.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: And it will be said to them, “Where is what you were serving

verses.quran_arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
verses.text: instead of God? (Can) they defend you or defend themselves?”
And then they will be tossed into it – they and the ones who are in error –
and the forces of Iblīs – all (of them).
They will say, as they are disputing there,

verses.quran_arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: “By God! We were indeed far astray,
when we made you equal with the Lord of the worlds.
(It was) only the sinners who led us astray.
(Now) we have no intercessors,
and no true friend.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةًۭ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: If only we had (another) turn, and (could) be among the believers!”’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
The people of Noah called the envoys liars:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: When their brother Noah said to them, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
Surely I am a trustworthy messenger for you,
so guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the Lord of the worlds.
Guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.’
They said, ‘Shall we believe you, when (only) the worst (people) follow you?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘What do I know about what they have done?

verses.quran_arabic: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Their reckoning is only with my Lord, if (only) you realized (it).
I am not going to drive away the believers.
I am only a clear warner.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘If indeed you do not stop, Noah, you will indeed be one of the stoned.’
He said, ‘My Lord, surely my people have called me a liar,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًۭا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: so disclose (the truth) decisively between me and them, and rescue me and those of the believers who are with me.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَنجَيْنَٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: So We rescued him, and those who were with him, in the loaded ship.
Then, after that, We drowned the rest.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
‘Ād called the envoys liars:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: When their brother Hūd said to them, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
Surely I am a trustworthy messenger for you,
so guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the Lord of the worlds.
Do you build a sign on every high place in vain,
and take strongholds in the hope that you may remain there?
And when you attack (someone), do you attack like tyrants?
Guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.
Guard (yourselves) against the One who has increased you with what you know.
He has increased you with livestock and sons,
and gardens and fountains.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Surely I fear for you the punishment of a great day.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘(It is) the same for us whether you admonish (us) or are not one of the admonishers.
This is nothing but the creation of those of old.

canonical_variants.english: This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,
This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,
This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,
This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,

verses.text: We are not going to be punished.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So they called him a liar, and We destroyed them. Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
Thamūd called the envoys liars:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: When their brother Ṣāliḥ said to them, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
Surely I am a trustworthy messenger for you,
so guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the Lord of the worlds.
Will you be left secure in what is here,
in gardens and springs,
and (fields of) crops and date palms (with) its slender sheath?
Will you (continue to) carve houses out of the mountains with skill?

canonical_variants.english: And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?

verses.text: Guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.
Do not obey the command of the wanton,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: those who foment corruption on the earth and do not set (things) right.’
They said, ‘You are only one of the bewitched.

verses.quran_arabic: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: You are nothing but a human being like us. Bring (us) a sign, if you are one of the truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌۭ لَّهَا شِرْبٌۭ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
verses.text: He said, ‘This is a she-camel: to her a drink and to you a drink, on a day made known.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍۢ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Do not touch her with evil, or the punishment of a great day will seize you.’
But they wounded her, and morning found them full of regret,

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and the punishment seized them. Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
The people of Lot called the envoys liars:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: When their brother Lot said to them, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
Surely I am a trustworthy messenger for you,
so guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the Lord of the worlds.
Do you approach the males of all peoples,

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
verses.text: and leave your wives whom your Lord created for you? Yes! You are a people who transgress!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘If indeed you do not stop, Lot, you will indeed be one of the expelled.’
He said, ‘Surely I am one of those who despise what you do.
My Lord, rescue me and my family from what they do.’
So We rescued him and his family – all (of them) –
except for an old woman among those who stayed behind.
Then We destroyed the others.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًۭا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: We rained down on them a rain, and evil was the rain on those who had been warned!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
The people of the Grove called the envoys liars:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: When Shu‘ayb said to them, ‘Will you not guard (yourselves)?
I am a trustworthy messenger for you,
so guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the Lord of the worlds.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
verses.text: Fill up the measure, and do not be cheaters,
and weigh with the even scale,

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: and do not shortchange the people of their wealth, and do not act wickedly on the earth, fomenting corruption.
Guard (yourselves) against the One who created you and the multitudes of old.’
They said, ‘You are only one of the bewitched.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: You are nothing but a human being like us. Surely we think (that) you are indeed one of the liars.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Make fragments of the sky fall on us, if you are one of the truthful.’

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَا إِن كُنتَ  مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make pieces from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآ۟ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ا۪ن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسْفاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآ۟ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسْفاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ ان كُنتَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.

verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord knows what you are doing.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: But they called him a liar, and the punishment of the Day of Shadow seized them. Surely it was the punishment of a great day.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed, but most of them do not believe.
Surely your Lord – He indeed is the Mighty, the Compassionate.
Surely it is indeed a sending down from the Lord of the worlds.
The trustworthy spirit has brought it down

canonical_variants.english: He bestowed the Trustworthy Spirit with it from on high
The Trustworthy Spirit came down with it

verses.text: on your heart, so that you may be one of the warners,
in a clear Arabic language.
Surely it is indeed in the scriptures of those of old.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: Was it not a sign for them that it was known to the learned of the Sons of Israel?
If We had sent it down on one of the foreigners,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and he had recited it to them, they would not have believed in it.
In this way We put it into the hearts of the sinners.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment,
and it will come upon them unexpectedly, when they do not realize (it),
and they will say, ‘Are we going to be spared?’
Do they seek to hurry Our punishment?
Have you considered? If We give them enjoyment (of life) for (some) years,
(and) then what they were promised comes upon them,

verses.quran_arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
verses.text: what use will the enjoyment they were given be to them?

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
verses.text: We have not destroyed any town without its having warners
as a reminder. We have not been evildoers.
The satans have not brought it down.
It is not fitting for them (to do), nor are they able (to).
Surely they are removed indeed from the hearing (of it).

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: Do not call on another god (along) with God, or you will be one of the punished.
Warn your clan,

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ وَرَهْطَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ
competing_variants.variant_english: And warn your tribe of near kindred, and your sincere group among them (an explicit addition to the standard Uthmanic reading, specifying the chosen or devoted ones among the relatives).
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ مُوسَى، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا الأَعْمَشُ، حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مُرَّةَ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ قَالَ لَمَّا نَزَلَتْ ‏{‏وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ‏}‏ وَرَهْطَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ، خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَتَّى صَعِدَ الصَّفَا فَهَتَفَ ‏"‏ يَا صَبَاحَاهْ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقَالُوا مَنْ هَذَا، فَاجْتَمَعُوا إِلَيْهِ‏.‏ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ أَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَخْبَرْتُكُمْ أَنَّ خَيْلاً تَخْرُجُ مِنْ سَفْحِ هَذَا الْجَبَلِ أَكُنْتُمْ مُصَدِّقِيَّ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالُوا مَا جَرَّبْنَا عَلَيْكَ كَذِبًا‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ فَإِنِّي نَذِيرٌ لَكُمْ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ أَبُو لَهَبٍ تَبًّا لَكَ مَا جَمَعْتَنَا إِلاَّ لِهَذَا ثُمَّ قَامَ فَنَزَلَتْ ‏{‏تَبَّتْ يَدَا أَبِي لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ‏}‏ وَقَدْ تَبَّ هَكَذَا قَرَأَهَا الأَعْمَشُ يَوْمَئِذٍ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Ibn `Abbas:When the Verse:-- 'And warn your tribe of near kindred.' (26.214) was revealed. Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) went out, and when he had ascended As-Safa mountain, he shouted, "O Sabahah!" The people said, "Who is that?" "Then they gathered around him, whereupon he said, "Do you see? If I inform you that cavalrymen are proceeding up the side of this mountain, will you believe me?" They said, "We have never heard you telling a lie." Then he said, "I am a plain warner to you of a coming severe punishment." Abu Lahab said, "May you perish! You gathered us only for this reason? " Then Abu Lahab went away. So the "Surat:--ul--LAHAB" 'Perish the hands of Abu Lahab!' (111.1) was revealed [omitted from the original translation: "and your sincere group among them" (after the mention of verse 26:214), and the ending phrase " 'and indeed he perished' (wa qad tabba). Thus did Al-A'mash recite it that day."]

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ وَرَهْطَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ
competing_variants.variant_english: And warn thy nearest kindred, and thy group of selected people among them.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: وَحَدَّثَنَا أَبُو كُرَيْبٍ، مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلاَءِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ لَمَّا نَزَلَتْ هَذِهِ الآيَةُ ‏{‏ وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ‏}‏ وَرَهْطَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ ‏.‏ خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَتَّى صَعِدَ الصَّفَا فَهَتَفَ ‏"‏ يَا صَبَاحَاهْ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ فَقَالُوا مَنْ هَذَا الَّذِي يَهْتِفُ قَالُوا مُحَمَّدٌ ‏.‏ فَاجْتَمَعُوا إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ يَا بَنِي فُلاَنٍ يَا بَنِي فُلاَنٍ يَا بَنِي فُلاَنٍ يَا بَنِي عَبْدِ مَنَافٍ يَا بَنِي عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ ‏"‏ فَاجْتَمَعُوا إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ أَرَأَيْتَكُمْ لَوْ أَخْبَرْتُكُمْ أَنَّ خَيْلاً تَخْرُجُ بِسَفْحِ هَذَا الْجَبَلِ أَكُنْتُمْ مُصَدِّقِيَّ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ قَالُوا مَا جَرَّبْنَا عَلَيْكَ كَذِبًا ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ فَإِنِّي نَذِيرٌ لَكُمْ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ أَبُو لَهَبٍ تَبًّا لَكَ أَمَا جَمَعْتَنَا إِلاَّ لِهَذَا ثُمَّ قَامَ فَنَزَلَتْ هَذِهِ السُّورَةُ تَبَّتْ يَدَا أَبِي لَهَبٍ وَقَدْ تَبَّ ‏.‏ كَذَا قَرَأَ الأَعْمَشُ إِلَى آخِرِ السُّورَةِ ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: It is reported on the authority of Ibn 'Abbas that when this verse was revealed:" And warn thy nearest kindred" (and thy group of selected people among them) the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) set off till he climbed Safa' and called loudly: Be on your guard! They said: Who is it calling aloud? They said: Muhammad. They gathered round him, and he said: O sons of so and so, O sons of so and so, O sons of 'Abd Manaf, O sons of 'Abd al-Muttalib, and they gathered around him. He (the Apostle) said: If I were to inform you that there were horsemen emerging out of the foot of this mountain, would you believe me? They said: We have not experienced any lie from you. He said: Well, I am a warner to you before a severe torment. He (the narrator) said that Abu Lahab then said: Destruction to you! Is it for this you have gathered us? He (the Holy Prophet) then stood up, and this verse was revealed:" Perish the hands of Abu Lahab, and he indeed perished" (cxi. 1). A'mash recited this to the end of the Sura

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and lower your wing to whoever follows you of the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌۭ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: If they disobey you, say: ‘I am free of what you do.’
Put your trust in the Mighty, the Compassionate,

canonical_variants.english: Then place your trust in the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
Then place your trust in the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

verses.text: who sees you when you stand,
and when you turn about among the ones who prostrate themselves.
Surely He – He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
verses.text: Shall I inform you on whom the satans come down?
They come down on every liar (and) sinner.
They listen attentively, but most of them are liars.
And the poets – the ones who are in error follow them.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍۢ يَهِيمُونَ
verses.text: Do you not see that they wander in every wādī,
and that they say what they do not do?

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًۭا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍۢ يَنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: – except for those who believe, and do righteous deeds, and remember God often, and defend themselves after they have suffered evil. Those who have done evil will come to know what a complete overturning they will suffer.
